method: ADR 0009 D5 — record the Linux CI baseline FIRST; ceilings are baseline p95 plus fixed headroom, set once per roadmap cycle, never ratcheted per item. Scenarios without maxP95Ms are in RECORDING mode: the bench reports them and cannot fail on them.

runner.measurement: fresh child processes; wall time of the complete spawn (node startup + TypeScript load + validate); non-zero child exits abort the run

hook.rationale: The per-keystroke interactive path: ark-mcp --hook validates the single proposed file (no scan-cache involvement — one distribution). Phase Y clean Linux p95 was 629.687 ms in CI run 29593179029 attempt 1 and 683.761 ms on its unchanged-head retry; the larger value is the cycle baseline. The fixed 900 ms ceiling rounds up baseline +30% runner headroom and is never ratcheted per item (ADR 0009 D5).

doctorCold.rationale: Cold one-shot doctor over the tree. Phase Y clean Linux p95 reached 5154.522 ms in CI run 29593179029 attempt 1 on an unchanged-engine docs candidate; its unchanged-head retry measured 4714.687 ms and main run 29608857827 measured 4781.35 ms. The largest value is the cycle baseline. The fixed 6800 ms ceiling rounds up baseline +30% runner headroom and is never ratcheted per item (ADR 0009 D5).
